title: phlegmariurus ciliolatus
intro: Phlegmariurus ciliolatus, also known as the Chinese forked polypody, is a species of plant in the lycopodiopsida class, which is a type of lycopodiaceous plant. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus ciliolatus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
